location_tracking.description: Continuously track GPS location during enrollment session

video_recording.description: Record video of entire enrollment session for audit trail

microphone_recording.description: Record audio during enrollment session for fraud verification

device_metadata.description: Capture device info (user agent, screen size, IP, etc.)

agent_selfie.description: Require agent to take a selfie at end of enrollment for fraud check

body_texture_capture.description: Capture full side-view body texture of the animal (for future use)

embeddings.description: Weighted similarity: 80% muzzle print, 15% cow full body, 5% body texture pattern

steps.label: Cow Detection
steps.description: Detect and capture cow full body image

steps.label: Muzzle Detection
steps.description: Detect and capture muzzle close-up for biometric ID

steps.label: Body Texture
steps.description: Capture full side-view body image for texture analysis

agent_assignment.description: Agents are assigned in round-robin order. Fallback: random assignment.

cache.description: Videos auto-deleted after 7 days. Session metadata kept for 90 days.
